data.body: REAL BUG FOUND (not a flake): d6bd made get_baseline unconditional; its subagent added get_baseline/is_pending to ~24 UNIT stubs but MISSED 4 INTEGRATION-tier BindingStore stubs (test_reconcile_roundtrip, test_link_sync, jira_contract/test_roundtrip + test_snapshot_contract). Default local suite EXCLUDES integration tier (only CI macos-py3.13 runs it) so it slipped past local validation — CI caught it (AttributeError: no attribute get_baseline). Fixed all 4 stubs (is_pending->False, get_baseline->None), folded into d6bd via non-interactive fixup+autosquash. Local: integration reconciler tier 34 passed. Re-pushed (updated 2: 659 d6bd + 663 5566). 654/655/656 already green; awaiting CI on 653(recheck perf-flake)/659/663. Lesson: run integration tier explicitly, not just default suite.
